examples: He refused to attend out of sheer perversity.
Marx, with his usual perversity, thought it was both.
And in a masterstroke of dramatic perversity, Io is given to Perseus-as a gift from the gods-just before the movie ends.
Some kinds of perversity are so bizarre that one despairs of ever understanding them.
An examination of the regulation of participants in the investment management process reveals a certain perversity.
